# Configure the Application

## Introduction

This guide explains how to configure the application after installation.

## Prerequisites

Before you begin, ensure you have:

- A completed installation
- A text editor

## Steps

1. Open the configuration file at `~/.config/app/config.yaml`.
2. Set the required fields.
3. Save the file and restart the application.
